dragoon_thrust.name: Dragoon Thrust
dragoon_thrust.description: Setup/Builder: A long-range spear thrust. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Jump Pip.

dragon_breath.name: Dragon's Breath
dragon_breath.description: Setup: Exhale a small burst of heat to tenderize the foe. Generates 1 Jump Pip and applies [Marked].

dragon_dive.name: Dragon Dive
dragon_dive.description: Payoff: Strike from the heavens. Consumes 5 Jump Pips to deal massive Physical damage in a small AOE. Break [Prone] and [Staggered] targets.

leg_sweep.name: Leg Sweep
leg_sweep.description: Payoff: Sweep the target's feet with your polearm. Consumes 3 Jump Pips to deal damage and apply [Prone].

steel_scale.name: Steel Scale
steel_scale.description: Defense: Tense your muscles like a dragon's armored hide. Grants 40% Physical reduction for 6 ticks.

high_jump_defense.name: High Jump
high_jump_defense.description: Defense: Leap high into the air to avoid a ground-based strike. Grants [Untargetable] for 1 tick.

dragoon_jump.name: Dragoon Jump
dragoon_jump.description: Mobility: Leap to any room in the same zone instantly.

dragonheart.name: Dragonheart
dragonheart.description: Utility/Signature: Your Jump Pips and Pacing costs are halved for 15 ticks.

dragoon_physiology.name: Dragoon Physiology
dragoon_physiology.description: Passive: Sky Master. You deal 20% bonus damage when attacking a target from a different room or immediately after a Jump.
